complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Implement load_editor_state function handling clips, peaks, duration, and ghost_events loading; 2) Implement save_edited_timeline with JSON validation and song_hash extraction from directory; 3) Implement bake_auto_schedule with conversion of auto events to EffectClip records and deduplication logic (±20ms tolerance).
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Involves multiple handler functions with data loading, JSON validation, directory parsing, and deduplication logic requiring careful time-based matching. Moderate complexity due to data model interactions and error handling, but follows established patterns from task 43. Dependencies on 43/44 are straightforward. Testing requires payload malformation and dedupe edge cases.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Extend CompositorConfig with effects_timeline and auto_reactivity_master; 2) Implement _build_frame_effects_context for fast per-frame callables; 3) Update _render_compositor_frame to apply effects in fixed order (zoom_punch -> screen_shake -> chromatic_aberration -> scanline_tear -> color_invert); 4) Integrate user BEAM and LOGO_GLITCH clips additively into beam and impact-glitch paths with master scaling only on auto paths.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity from modifying core rendering pipeline with multiple interdependent changes: config extension, context building, ordered effect chaining, and selective clip merging. Performance-critical per-frame operations demand optimization. Many dependencies (45-48,54,55) indicate integration risk. Ensures main branch compatibility requires regression testing.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Scaffold build_editor_html mirroring lyrics editor structure with container setup; 2) Implement waveform canvas rendering and 7 color-coded effect rows; 3) Add drag/resize, multi-select, rubber-band selection, and zoom controls in vanilla JS; 4) Create per-clip gear panels bound to dynamic settings dictionaries; 5) Add ghost auto markers, per-row disable checkboxes, and master reactivity slider with state synchronization.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Very high complexity for vanilla JS implementation of sophisticated timeline editor with waveform rendering, multi-clip manipulation, interactive panels, and real-time state binding. No framework support increases custom code volume. Mirrors existing lyrics editor but adds 7 rows + ghosts. Manual testing only heightens implementation burden.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Implement gr.Tab for Effects timeline mirroring lyrics tab pattern: add HTML component for editor, hidden Textbox for state, and Load/Save/Bake/Clear buttons wired to respective handlers (_load_effects_editor, etc.).
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low complexity as direct pattern matching of existing lyrics tab implementation. Standard Gradio components with straightforward event wiring. Single dependency (50) simplifies integration.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Extend OrchestratorInputs with effects_timeline_enabled (default True) and auto_reactivity_master (default 1.0); add conditional loading of effects_timeline.json; pass timeline and master value through to CompositorConfig.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Straightforward schema extension and conditional data flow integration. Follows existing orchestrator patterns. Minimal logic with clear defaults and testing strategy.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Unit tests for effects_timeline (JSON roundtrip, validation, bake) and effects_editor handlers; 2) Renderer integration tests (screen_shake.py, etc.) and compositor_effects_timeline regression tests; 3) Documentation including effects-timeline-editor.md, effects-timeline-renderers.md, and updates to index.md/ai-context.md.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity from creating multiple test files covering serialization, validation, integration, and regression scenarios across new features. Documentation requires accurate technical capture of complex renderer/editor interactions. Many dependencies indicate comprehensive coverage needed.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Core logic for finding active CHROMATIC_ABERRATION clips at time t, compute per-frame deterministic shifts using song_hash+clip.id+t seed, handle jitter/direction_deg settings with bounds; 2) NumPy implementation of RGB channel splitting, np.roll/warpAffine shifts (R/B opposite directions, G fixed), recombination returning new ndarray without mutation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high complexity involving image processing with channel separation, deterministic seeded jitter, bounded transformations, and strict immutability contract. NumPy-only preference adds optimization challenge. Follows patterns from 45-47 but more sophisticated pixel manipulation. Precise testing requires bit-identical verification.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Clip activation detection and per-frame deterministic band positioning/offsets using hash(song_hash + clip.id + round(t*1000)), handle intensity/band_count/band_height_px/wrap_mode settings; 2) Multi-band horizontal shifting via np.roll per band with accumulation across overlapping clips, bounded shifts, returning new ndarray.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Similar complexity to 54 with added multi-band logic, overlapping clip accumulation, and wrap_mode variations. Deterministic seeding matches pipeline patterns. Whole-frame RGB shifting simpler than per-channel but band computation adds intricacy. Strict testing for exact band counts and determinism.
